introduction.text: Welcome to the table! In Blackjack, you play against me. The goal is simple: get more points than me without going over 21. Face cards are 10, Ace is 1 or 11. Important rule: I play like a robot – I must hit on 16 or less. I always stand on 17 or more. Let's start!

sequence.text: You have 12 points (7 + 5). That's too low to be safe against my 6. You need to take a card. Click HIT.

finish.text: Ouch! 22 is a 'Bust'. You went over 21 and lose automatically, no matter what I have. Remember: greed kills!

sequence.text: You have 19 points. That's a strong hand. I must hit up to 16, so I might bust. Don't risk it. Click STAND.

finish.text: You won! You waited patiently with 19. I had 13, had to hit, and busted with 23.

scenarios.title: Building a Hand (Multi-Hit)
scenarios.goal: Show that sometimes you need to hit multiple times.

sequence.text: You only have 5 points. I have a strong 10. You must build your hand. Click HIT.
You have 10 points. Still not enough against my 10. Be brave! Click HIT again.
Now you have 20! Great score. Don't risk it now. Click STAND.

finish.text: Bravo! You turned 5 points into 20. I have 17, so you win.

sequence.text: You have 11. I have a weak 5. The odds are heavily in your favor. Use DOUBLE DOWN to double your bet and get exactly one card.

finish.text: Perfect! You got a 9 for a total of 20. I busted. You win double the money!

sequence.text: You have two eights (16). That's the worst hand in the game. Save yourself and SPLIT them into two separate hands.

finish.text: Saved! You turned a lousy 16 into 18 and 19. You won both hands! Splitting saved the day.

conclusion.text: Great job! You now know the rules and my limits. In the next lesson, we stop guessing. We will start learning Basic Strategy – the mathematical way to beat the casino. Ready?
